case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BLAKE CHRISTOPHER TRIANA et al

docket_entries.description: SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TRIANA, BLAKE CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-19-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-14-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-04-2011
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-19-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-19-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 610
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR AND DISSOLVED. (610) PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-28-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-19-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-28-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST MICHAEL S. MORSE, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-28-2011, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-13-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-23-2011 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER VACATING SANCTION AS TO MICHAEL S. MORSE IMPOSED ON SEP-28-2011.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-23-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
